target: 2. A Long-Overdue Meal

Ah~, that's a great smell!
Shinpei's curry, it's been a while, huh?
Sorry Mio, can you bring over the salad too?

Sure.
Huh, the salad looks good too.

This dinner is really fancy today.
Hey, older sister?
Yeah…

It's a celebration of our two-year reunion,
and I'm also thanking you for letting us stay here tonight.
Of course, you can expect it to be good.
U-uh…

Shinpei's dad and mom aren't home today,
right? It's really like that?

What kind of lie is that?
They're at a university symposium in Osaka.
I thought it was an excuse to stay with you longer.
What?!
Idiot, that's not it.
Mio, don't say weird things.

Besides, even if Dad had some reason,
he wouldn't have let Shinpei stay here.
You're being way too overbearing.
You're saying something heartless again?

No way!
It's totally from the bottom of my heart!

It's Shinpei, Shinpei!
Don't you even think to be considerate?!
I mean… but Alain invited me, so…

Older sister, are you still mad?
You've been like that since this morning.
I'm not mad or anything…

Haha, well, let's eat already.
You'll pass out like that.

I'm not about to pass out
because I'm hungry!
Don't push yourself…
Shinpei, did you say something?
No, not really?

You know, older sister,
when are you gonna be honest?

Mio?
If you say anything more,
I won't let you eat the curry!

Why are you acting so high and mighty?
You're the one who made it, right?

There you go, Ushio, I made it extra big.
Sit down properly.

I don't need extra big portions.
Besides, I'm not even eating it!
(What an annoyance…)
Mio's portion is normal.

Y-yeah.
Thanks, Shinpei.

Alain hasn't come back yet, right?
I don't know where he went.

Maybe he's still busy?
It seems like he's been running around all day.
What preparation?

What do you mean, what preparation?
The summer festival at Hitogashima Shrine.

What are you doing?
You dropped your spoon?

Ah, sorry.
My hand slipped.
(What was that… feeling?)

(As soon as I heard 'summer festival',
it was like my whole body got goosebumps…)

Older sister,
can you get me another spoon?
Older sister?
Summer… festival…
(Even Ushio… had the same reaction?)

What's wrong with both of you?
You're both getting goosebumps…
I don't know why, but I suddenly felt cold…
(Still, I'm not the only one…)
M-maybe the AC temperature is just a bit low?
I don't think it's any different from usual.

Ah, maybe you caught a cold.
Do you have a fever?
I don't think so…

Shinpei, can I check your forehead?
I'll do a quick check.
Ah, sure.

Hmm, your forehead isn't warm.
It's the same as mine.

Maybe you caught a cold too, older sister.
You felt cold, right?
Then I'll check against Mio's forehead.
Hmm, same temperature.

You seem okay.
Even if you had a fever, eating Shinpei's curry
would make you feel better.
Hey, older sister?
Yeah… I guess so.
T-there's no crime in eating food, so I'll eat it.
You make it sound like I have a crime…

There, eat before it gets cold!
I'm going to eat!
I'm eating!
Delicious~!
Shinpei, your curry skills haven't dropped at all!
Thanks, I appreciate it.
I'm not praising you!

Actually, if you went to cooking school,
it's obvious you haven't improved at all, right?

It's natural the taste is the same.
I didn't change the method or ingredients.
You didn't add any fancy secret ingredients?

What are you talking about all of a sudden?
Aren't you just missing this taste, older sister?
S-such things don't exist!
Haha…
(That creepy cold feeling earlier…)
(What was that… anyway?)
